LLM output was not a JSON object; fallback applied.

[分段2/2]
Continuation of exposition about the creature's abilities and origins while introducing the Schmidt threat and advancing escape sequence

state_changes.before: Tang Feng skeptical about creature's innate真气 abilities
state_changes.after: Tang Feng forced to consider possibility that Tang Sect founder encountered similar creature
state_changes.story_value: recontextualization of family history through supernatural lens

state_changes.after: Schmidt actively confirmed as existential threat requiring immediate action

state_changes.before: Shi Jiu Chun resentful of Tang Feng
state_changes.after: Shi Jiu Chun humbled and eager to prove himself through joint mission
Creature has caught up and is investigating Tang Feng's机甲

reader_rewards: Revelation that真气 manipulation may be species-wide ability rather than human-learned skill
Connection established between Tang Sect founding legend and strange creature encounter
New antagonist Schmidt introduced as antimatter bomb creator threatening entire capital planet
Character arc development for Shi Jiu Chun - his pride wounded by learning his assassination was manipulated
open_hooks: Will the creature harm Tang Feng now that it has caught him?
Is there truly a connection between Tang Sect founder's legendary encounter and this creature?
How will Tang Feng escape the creature's pursuit?
What will happen when they confront Schmidt?
reusable_mechanisms: AI character delivers exposition through debate with protagonist
Mythological/legendary origin story recontextualized as literal historical event
Supernatural creature pursues protagonist after initial encounter
Wounded pride drives character to seek redemption through dangerous mission
Character with technical skills joins protagonist's cause after being humbled

craft_observations.pov_distance: Close third-person through Tang Feng, frequent internal monologue with profanity for comedic effect
craft_observations.sentence_rhythm: Short punchy sentences in dialogue, longer explanatory passages for exposition
craft_observations.paragraphing: Scene breaks with chapter heading markers, ellipsis used for pacing pauses
craft_observations.dialogue_method: AI and protagonist debate through back-and-forth challenge-rebuttal pattern
craft_observations.description_method: Minimal sensory description, focus on action consequences and character reactions
craft_observations.exposition_method: AI provides theoretical framework (宇宙能量,进化本能) to explain supernatural elements
craft_observations.hook_delivery: Chapter ends with creature's approach as cliffhanger
craft_observations.transition_method: Narrative interweaves multiple plot threads without clear scene breaks
do_not_copy: Chapter heading numbers and page references
Technical terms like 紫瞳心法

non_reusable_specifics: Tang Sect's紫瞳 technique and founder唐大旺 legend
白鹤神仙 winged immortal from founding myth
古堡 and伊纹山谷 locations
Characters: 唐枫, 凌夷, 诗酒淳, 张小妩, 朱高尊, 赛金花, 斯密特
risk_flags: Too many plot threads introduced simultaneously (creature origin, Schmidt threat, ancestral legend)
Excessive exposition through AI dialogue dumps
Text contains garbled/missing characters affecting readability
